title: SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 9A Cheat Sheet
printNote: Quick reference for SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 9A in SQL & Databases.

entries.syntax: -- SQL Database query for SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 9A
entries.example:
-- SQL Database query for SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 9A
SELECT id, title, category, created_at
FROM application_records
WHERE category = 'SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 9A' AND is_active = 1
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
entries.description: Basic syntax for SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 9A
